intro: Hello! We are all unique and special.
Some of us like to read, some like to play games.
Our likes, dislikes, and feelings make us who we are!
concept.tip: An identity card tells others who we are and keeps us safe!

problems.q: What card tells our name, address, and phone number?
options: 🪪 Identity card
🃏 Library membership card
🎂 Birthday party invitation card
problems.why: An identity card has all our important information and keeps us safe!

problems.q: Are our likes and dislikes the same as everyone else's?
options: ❌ No, we are all unique
✔️ Yes, everyone is identical
🤖 Everyone likes the exact same food
problems.why: We all like different games and foods, which makes each of us special!

problems.q: What should you do when you feel angry or sad?
options: 🧘 Take a deep breath and count to 10
😡 Throw toys and books around the room in anger
😭 Scream and yell loudly at your friends and family
problems.a: 🧘 Take a deep breath and count to 10
problems.why: Taking deep breaths helps calm our mind when we have big feelings.

problems.q: When do we celebrate your birthday?
options: 🎂 On the special day you were born
🏖️ Every year during the long summer holiday season
🎄 On Christmas Day during the winter vacation
problems.a: 🎂 On the special day you were born
problems.why: Your birthday is the exact day you were born!

problems.q: Why is it important to know your parents' phone number?
options: 📞 To call for help if we get lost
🎮 To play online video games on their mobile phone
📺 To order cartoons and movies on television
problems.a: 📞 To call for help if we get lost
problems.why: Knowing a parent's number helps teachers or police call them if you ever need help.

problems.q: What makes a person unique?
options: 🌟 Their favorite hobbies, smiles, and feelings
👕 Wearing the exact same school uniform every day
📏 Being taller than the highest tree in the park
problems.a: 🌟 Their favorite hobbies, smiles, and feelings
problems.why: Everyone has wonderful thoughts, hobbies, and feelings that make them one of a kind!

problems.q: If your friend likes painting but you like dancing, what should you do?
options: 🤝 Respect and cheer for what your friend likes
😤 Tell them painting is a boring and useless hobby
🙈 Stop talking to them and find another best friend
problems.a: 🤝 Respect and cheer for what your friend likes
problems.why: Good friends respect and enjoy learning about each other's hobbies!

intro: Our body is amazing! It has many helpful parts.
Our legs help us walk and run, and our hands help us hold things.
We have five sense organs that help us explore the world around us!
concept.tip: Our five sense organs are eyes, ears, nose, tongue, and skin!

problems.q: Which sense organ helps us see a bright rainbow?
options: 👁️ Eyes
👂 Ears
👃 Nose
problems.why: Our eyes help us see light, colors, and shapes all around us!

problems.q: How many sense organs do we have in our body?
options: 🖐️ Five
✌️ Two
🫱 Ten
problems.why: We have five sense organs: eyes, ears, nose, tongue, and skin!

problems.q: What part of our body helps us walk, jump, and run?
options: 🦵 Legs and feet
🦾 Elbows, shoulders, and strong arms
👂 Ears, nose, and facial muscles
problems.why: Our legs and feet support our body and help us move around!

problems.q: Which sense organ helps us taste sweet ice cream and sour lemons?
options: 👅 Tongue
👃 Nose
👁️ Eyes
problems.why: Our tongue has taste buds that let us taste sweet, sour, salty, and bitter foods!

problems.q: Which organ helps us hear the school bell ringing?
options: 👂 Ears
👁️ Eyes
🖐️ Skin
problems.why: Our ears catch sounds like music, voices, and bells!

problems.q: What do our hands and fingers help us do?
options: ✍️ Write, draw, and hold things
🚶 Walk across the busy street safely
🍟 Taste delicious sweet and savory food
problems.why: We use our hands and fingers to hold pencils, clap, and pick up toys!

problems.q: Which sense organ helps us feel if a puppy's fur is soft or rough?
options: 🖐️ Skin
👁️ Eyes
👅 Tongue
problems.why: Our skin covers our body and lets us feel touch, heat, and cold!

intro: We live together with our loved ones in a family.
Some families are small, some are big, and some are joint families.
We love, care for, and help each other every day!
concept.tip: Helping with small chores makes our family happy and strong!

problems.q: Who is your father's father or your mother's father?
options: 👴 Grandfather
👨 Uncle
👦 Brother
problems.why: Our parents' parents are our grandparents, and a father's or mother's father is our grandfather!

problems.q: What do we call a family where parents and one or two children live together?
options: 🏡 Small or nuclear family
🏰 Big joint family with uncles and aunts
🎪 Extended family living across cities
problems.why: A family with parents and their children living together is called a small or nuclear family.

problems.q: What do we call a family where grandparents, parents, uncles, aunts, and cousins live together?
options: 🌳 Joint family
🏕️ Small family
🚗 Single family
problems.why: When many relatives like grandparents, uncles, aunts, and cousins live together, it is a joint family!

problems.q: How can you be a helping hand in your family?
options: 🧸 Keeping your toys and books in their proper place
💥 Throwing food and toys across the floor
📺 Watching television all day without helping
problems.a: 🧸 Keeping your toys and books in their proper place
problems.why: Putting away our toys and keeping our room clean helps our parents and keeps the home tidy!

problems.q: Who is your mother's brother or father's brother?
options: 👨 Uncle
👴 Grandfather
👶 Cousin
problems.why: The brother of your father or mother is called your uncle!

problems.q: What are your uncle and aunt's children called?
options: 🧒 Cousins
👴 Grandparents
👮 Helpers
problems.why: The children of your uncles and aunts are your loving cousins!

problems.q: Why is living in a family special and important?
options: 💖 We share love, celebrate together, and care for each other
🏔️ Because we never have to share anything with others
⚡ Because we can argue and fight all day long
problems.a: 💖 We share love, celebrate together, and care for each other
problems.why: A family gives us safety, love, and happiness as we grow together!

intro: A house is a place where we live with our family.
It protects us from heat, cold, rain, and wild animals.
Some houses are strong pucca houses, and some are simple kutcha houses!
concept.tip: A clean and tidy home keeps us healthy and happy!

problems.q: Why do we need a house to live in?
options: ☔ To protect us from heat, cold, rain, and animals
🎈 So we can float high up in the blue sky
🏕️ To sleep outside in tents during summer camping trips
problems.a: ☔ To protect us from heat, cold, rain, and animals
problems.why: A house keeps our family safe, warm, and sheltered from bad weather!

problems.q: What materials are used to build a strong pucca house?
options: 🧱 Bricks, cement, steel, and stones
🌾 Dry straw, mud, bamboo, and green leaves
📦 Cardboard boxes, paper, and wooden planks
problems.why: Pucca houses in towns and cities are built strong using bricks, cement, and steel!

problems.q: What is a kutcha house usually made of?
options: 🌾 Mud, bamboo, straw, and dry leaves
🧱 Baked bricks, cement, iron rods, and stone slabs
🪙 Gold, silver, iron, and copper metals
problems.a: 🌾 Mud, bamboo, straw, and dry leaves
problems.why: Kutcha houses are simple huts often found in villages, built from mud, straw, and bamboo.

problems.q: In which room of the house do we cook delicious food?
options: 🍳 Kitchen
🛏️ Bedroom
🛁 Bathroom
problems.why: We prepare and cook our meals in the kitchen!

problems.q: Where do we go to sleep and rest when we are tired?
options: 🛏️ Bedroom
🍳 Kitchen
🛋️ Drawing room
problems.why: We sleep and rest comfortably in our bedroom.

problems.q: In which room do we sit with our guests and family to chat or watch TV?
options: 🛋️ Living room or drawing room
🛁 Bathroom
🍳 Kitchen
problems.why: The living room is where we welcome visitors and spend fun time together!

problems.q: What should we do to keep our home sweet home pleasant?
options: 🧹 Keep it clean, let sunlight in, and throw garbage in bins
🗑️ Throw wrappers and dirty clothes on the floor
🕷️ Let dust, dirt, and spider webs cover the walls
problems.a: 🧹 Keep it clean, let sunlight in, and throw garbage in bins
problems.why: Sunlight, fresh air, and cleanliness keep germs away and make our home beautiful!

intro: School is a wonderful place where we go to learn and play.
Our teachers teach us how to read, write, draw, and share.
We make new friends and learn good manners every day!
concept.tip: Always reach school on time and respect your teachers and friends!

problems.q: Why do we go to school daily?
options: 📚 To learn reading, writing, and good manners
🛝 To play sports all day without attending any classes
🛒 To buy fresh vegetables and weekly groceries
problems.a: 📚 To learn reading, writing, and good manners
problems.why: School is our temple of learning where we gain knowledge and learn good values!

problems.q: Who helps us learn new lessons and guides us in class?
options: 👩‍🏫 Teacher
👮 Police officer
👨‍🍳 Chef
problems.why: Our teachers work hard to teach us lessons, songs, and good habits!

problems.q: Where in the school do we go to read many interesting books?
options: 📖 Library
⚽ Playground
🥗 Canteen
problems.why: The school library is a quiet place full of story books and learning books!

problems.q: What items should you pack in your school bag every morning?
options: ✏️ Books, notebooks, pencils, and a lunch box
🐱 A pet kitten and puppy to play with
🎨 Only drawing coloring books and a football
problems.a: ✏️ Books, notebooks, pencils, and a lunch box
problems.why: We must carry our books and stationery so we are ready for our classes!

problems.q: Where do children play games and run around during recess?
options: ⚽ Playground
📖 Library
👩‍🏫 Principal's office
problems.why: The school playground is where we play fun sports and games with our friends!

problems.q: How should we behave in school?
options: 😊 Be polite, share with friends, and listen to teachers
😤 Push others and shout loudly in the corridors
🗑️ Tear pages from library books and litter the floor
problems.a: 😊 Be polite, share with friends, and listen to teachers
problems.why: Good manners and kindness make school a happy place for everyone!

problems.q: What do we wear when we go to school so everyone looks neat and united?
options: 👕 School uniform
👖 Casual blue jeans and colorful party T-shirts
🩱 Colorful swimming costume and cap
problems.why: Wearing a clean school uniform gives us pride and a sense of belonging!

intro: Plants are our green friends! They grow all around us.
Some plants are tall and strong trees, while some are small bushes.
They give us fresh air, tasty fruits, flowers, and shade!
concept.tip: Plants need sunlight, soil, and water to grow strong and healthy!

problems.q: What do we call big, tall, and strong plants like neem and mango?
options: 🌳 Trees
🌾 Grass
🍄 Mushrooms
problems.why: Big and tall plants with thick woody stems are called trees!

problems.q: Which part of the plant grows under the soil and absorbs water?
options: 🌱 Roots
🍃 Leaves
🌸 Flowers
problems.why: Roots fix the plant tightly in the soil and suck up water and minerals!

problems.q: Which green part of the plant makes food using sunlight?
options: 🍃 Leaf
🪵 Root
🪨 Bark
problems.why: Leaves are called the kitchen of the plant because they prepare food in the sunlight!

problems.q: What colorful and fragrant part of a plant turns into fruit?
options: 🌸 Flower
🌱 Root
🪵 Trunk
problems.why: Flowers bloom with lovely colors and scents, and many grow into delicious fruits!

problems.q: What do plants need to grow big and healthy?
options: ☀️ Sunlight, water, air, and good soil
🌱 Only soil and dark shade, without any water or sunlight
📺 Television cartoons and video games
problems.a: ☀️ Sunlight, water, air, and good soil
problems.why: Just like we need food, plants need sunlight, fresh air, and water to grow!

problems.q: Why are plants called our green friends?
options: 🍏 They give us oxygen to breathe, food to eat, and cool shade
🌧️ Because they only grow during heavy summer rain showers
🗣️ They speak Hindi and English with children
problems.a: 🍏 They give us oxygen to breathe, food to eat, and cool shade
problems.why: Plants clean the air and provide us with vegetables, fruits, medicines, and wood!

problems.q: How should we care for plants and trees around us?
options: 💧 Water them regularly and never pluck leaves unnecessarily
🪓 Cut down green trees for fun and games
✂️ Trim off all their green leaves every single day
problems.a: 💧 Water them regularly and never pluck leaves unnecessarily
problems.why: Loving and protecting plants keeps our Earth green and beautiful!

intro: We share our wonderful Earth with many kinds of animals.
Some animals live in forests (wild animals), and some live on farms or in our homes (domestic and pet animals).
Birds fly in the sky, and fish swim in water!
concept.tip: Always be kind to animals and provide clean water and food for pets!

problems.q: Which animal is known as the King of the Jungle?
options: 🦁 Lion
🐰 Rabbit
🐭 Mouse
problems.why: The strong and brave lion lives in the forest and is called the King of the Jungle!

problems.q: What do we call animals like cows, sheep, and hens that live on farms and help us?
options: 🐄 Domestic or farm animals
🐅 Wild jungle animals
🦖 Extinct dinosaurs
problems.why: Domestic animals live near us and give us milk, wool, and eggs!

problems.q: Which friendly animal lives in our home as a pet and guards the house?
options: 🐶 Dog
🐘 Elephant
🐊 Crocodile
problems.why: Dogs are faithful pets who love us, play with us, and protect our home!

problems.q: How do birds fly in the sky?
options: 🦅 With the help of their wings and light feathers
🦵 By jumping very high with long legs and webbed feet
🚀 With rocket engines attached to their backs
problems.a: 🦅 With the help of their wings and light feathers
problems.why: Birds have wings and feathers that help them glide and fly smoothly through the air!

problems.q: Where do fish live and swim?
options: 🐟 In water like ponds, rivers, and oceans
🕳️ In deep underground caves and dark soil burrows
🏜️ In dry desert sand without any water
problems.a: 🐟 In water like ponds, rivers, and oceans
problems.why: Fish are water animals that swim using fins and breathe under water using gills!

problems.q: What sound does a cow make?
options: 🐮 Moo moo
🐱 Meow meow
🦁 Roar roar
problems.why: Cows moo gently while they chew green grass in the field!

problems.q: How should we treat our pets and neighborhood animals?
options: 💖 Give them food, clean water, and lots of love and kindness
🪨 Throw stones, shout, and tease them unkindly
⛓️ Tie them up tightly with heavy ropes all day
problems.a: 💖 Give them food, clean water, and lots of love and kindness
problems.why: Animals can feel pain and hunger just like us, so we must always treat them gently!

intro: We eat food every day to get energy to play, study, and grow.
We get delicious food from plants (fruits, vegetables, grains) and animals (milk, eggs).
Eating clean, healthy food keeps us strong and fights off sickness!
concept.tip: Always wash your hands before and after eating every meal!

problems.q: Why do we need to eat food every day?
options: ⚡ To get energy to grow, play, and stay healthy
🦷 To keep our teeth white without brushing them
🎨 Because food is just for decoration and painting
problems.a: ⚡ To get energy to grow, play, and stay healthy
problems.why: Food is like fuel for our body! It gives us strength and energy to do fun activities.

problems.q: Which of these foods do we get from plants and trees?
options: 🍎 Apples, carrots, rice, and wheat
🥛 Milk, curd, and cheese
🥚 Eggs and honey
problems.why: Fruits, vegetables, pulses, and grains grow on green plants and trees!

problems.q: Where do we get fresh white milk from?
options: 🐄 Cows, buffaloes, and goats
🌾 Wheat, rice, and corn plants growing in farm fields
🪨 Cold river rocks and mountain stones
problems.why: Milk is an animal product given by gentle farm animals like cows and goats!

problems.q: What should you always do before eating your breakfast, lunch, or dinner?
options: 🧼 Wash your hands nicely with soap and water
🤾 Play in the garden mud without washing hands
🐶 Wipe your dirty hands on the pet puppy's fur
problems.a: 🧼 Wash your hands nicely with soap and water
problems.why: Washing hands removes dirt and germs so they do not go inside our tummy!

problems.q: Why is drinking milk good for growing children?
options: 🦴 It makes our bones and teeth strong and healthy
🏃 It helps us run without needing to sleep or rest
🎈 It makes our body float high up in the air
problems.a: 🦴 It makes our bones and teeth strong and healthy
problems.why: Milk is a complete food full of calcium that builds super strong bones and teeth!

problems.q: How many main meals do we eat in a day?
options: 🍽️ Three meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner
✌️ Two meals: morning breakfast and evening dinner
🔢 Ten small meals every hour of the day
problems.a: 🍽️ Three meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner
problems.why: We eat breakfast in the morning, lunch in the afternoon, and dinner at night!

problems.q: Why should we avoid eating too much uncovered street food or junk food?
options: 🦠 Uncovered street food can catch dust and harmful germs
🥗 Because homemade cooked food is too spicy to eat
🚫 Because drinking clean water is too sweet
problems.a: 🦠 Uncovered street food can catch dust and harmful germs
problems.why: Eating fresh, clean, homemade food protects our stomach from harmful germs!

intro: We wear clothes to cover our body and look smart and neat.
Clothes protect us from hot sun, freezing cold, wind, and rain.
We wear different types of clothes in summer, winter, and rainy seasons!
concept.tip: Wear light cotton clothes in summer and warm woolen sweaters in winter!

problems.q: Why do we wear clothes?
options: 👕 To cover our body and protect us from weather and dust
🙈 So no one can ever see our face
🩱 Because clothes make our body heavier and stronger
problems.a: 👕 To cover our body and protect us from weather and dust
problems.why: Clothes protect our skin from heat, cold, rain, and insect bites!

problems.q: What type of clothes should we wear during hot summer days?
options: 🩳 Light cotton clothes that keep us cool
🧣 Heavy woolen jackets and gloves
🧥 Plastic raincoats
problems.a: 🩳 Light cotton clothes that keep us cool
problems.why: Cotton clothes absorb sweat and let air pass through, keeping us cool in summer!

problems.q: What do we wear when it is very cold in winter?
options: 🧥 Woolen sweaters, jackets, caps, and gloves
🩱 Swimming trunks
🩳 Shorts and sleeveless shirts
problems.a: 🧥 Woolen sweaters, jackets, caps, and gloves
problems.why: Woolen clothes trap body heat and keep us warm and cozy during cold winters!

problems.q: What do we use or wear when we go out in heavy rain?
options: ☔ Raincoats, gumboots, and umbrellas
🧦 Paper shoes and silk dresses
🧣 Woolen scarves
problems.why: Raincoats and umbrellas are waterproof and keep us dry when it rains!

problems.q: Where do we get warm wool from?
options: 🐑 From the thick soft fleece of sheep
🐛 From tiny white silkworms on mulberry leaves
🪴 From white cotton balls growing on cotton plants
problems.a: 🐑 From the thick soft fleece of sheep
problems.why: Sheep grow thick woolen hair called fleece, which is spun into yarn for sweaters!

problems.q: What do we call the special dress worn by students to school or doctors to a hospital?
options: 👔 Uniform
🧙 Costume
🥻 Nightdress
problems.why: A uniform identifies people in a school or job, like students, doctors, and police officers!

problems.q: What do we call special traditional clothes worn during festivals and weddings around the world?
options: 👘 Costumes or festive dresses
🩱 Colorful swimming costume and caps
🧦 Woolen gym socks and running shoes
problems.why: People celebrate cultures and festivals by wearing colorful traditional costumes!

intro: Air and water are essential for all living things on Earth!
We cannot see air, but we can feel it when the wind blows.
We need clean water to drink, bathe, cook, and grow green plants!
concept.tip: Never waste water! Turn off the tap tightly while brushing your teeth!

problems.q: Can we see the air around us?
options: ❌ No, we cannot see air, but we can feel it when it moves
✔️ Yes, we can see air as a thick white fog every day
✔️ Yes, we can see clean air shining in bright sunlight
problems.a: ❌ No, we cannot see air, but we can feel it when it moves
problems.why: Air is invisible, but we feel moving air (wind) on our face and see leaves rustling!

problems.q: What do all living things like people, animals, and plants need to live?
options: 🌬️ Fresh air to breathe and clean water to drink
🥤 Only cold fruit juices and sweetened milk
💰 Shiny gold coins and diamond jewels
problems.a: 🌬️ Fresh air to breathe and clean water to drink
problems.why: Without fresh air and water, living things cannot survive!

problems.q: Which of these toys or objects can be filled with air?
options: 🎈 Balloons, footballs, and bicycle tires
🪨 Heavy boulders, river rocks, and mountain stones
🥄 Wooden spoons
problems.why: Air takes up space inside balloons, balls, and tires, puffing them up!

problems.q: Where does rainwater come from?
options: 🌧️ From dark rain clouds in the sky
🚰 From inside underground municipal water pipes
🕳️ From underground caves
problems.a: 🌧️ From dark rain clouds in the sky
problems.why: Rain falls from rain clouds and fills up lakes, rivers, and ponds on Earth!

problems.q: What are the main uses of water at home?
options: 🥛 Drinking, cooking, bathing, washing, and watering plants
🔥 Lighting big outdoor campfires and burning forest wood
📜 Writing letters and painting on paper
problems.a: 🥛 Drinking, cooking, bathing, washing, and watering plants
problems.why: We use clean water every single day for keeping ourselves and our home clean and healthy!

problems.q: What should you do while brushing your teeth to save precious water?
options: 🚰 Turn off the tap tightly while brushing
🌊 Leave the tap running full blast wasting water
🪣 Spill clean water all over the bathroom floor
problems.a: 🚰 Turn off the tap tightly while brushing
problems.why: Every drop of clean water is precious, so turning off the tap saves gallons of water!

problems.q: Why should we always drink clean, filtered, or boiled water?
options: 💧 Clean water is free from germs and keeps us healthy
🚰 Because cold tap water from any pond is always safe
🥤 Because boiled water is sweeter than fruit juice
problems.a: 💧 Clean water is free from germs and keeps us healthy
problems.why: Dirty water contains germs that can make us fall sick, so we must always drink clean water!

intro: The families living near our house are our friendly neighbours.
All the houses, parks, markets, and places around our home make up our neighbourhood.
We should always keep our neighbourhood clean, peaceful, and green!
concept.tip: Say hello to your neighbours and help them whenever they need support!

problems.q: Who are our neighbours?
options: 🏡 The friendly people and families who live near our house
🏫 The school teachers and classmates living across the city
👩‍⚕️ The doctors and nurses working at the city hospital
problems.a: 🏡 The friendly people and families who live near our house
problems.why: Neighbours live close to us, celebrate together, and help each other in times of need!

problems.q: Where do we go in our neighbourhood to buy vegetables, fruits, and groceries?
options: 🛒 The local market or shops
🏥 The hospital operating room
🏫 The school principal's office
problems.why: The market has shops where we can buy everyday food, clothes, and household items!

problems.q: Where do we go when we fall sick or get injured?
options: 🏥 Hospital or clinic to see a doctor
🎪 A colorful entertainment circus tent
🍞 A neighborhood bakery shop for bread
problems.a: 🏥 Hospital or clinic to see a doctor
problems.why: Doctors and nurses in a hospital examine us and give medicines to make us well!

problems.q: Where do we go to deposit money or keep our savings safe?
options: 🏦 Bank
🌳 Park playground
⚽ Football stadium
problems.why: A bank is a safe place where people deposit money and valuable jewels!

problems.q: Who keeps our neighbourhood safe and catches thieves?
options: 👮 Police officers at the police station
👨‍🍳 Chefs cooking food in a restaurant
🧑‍🎨 Painters drawing pictures in an art gallery
problems.a: 👮 Police officers at the police station
problems.why: Police officers work hard day and night to maintain law and order and keep us safe!

problems.q: Where can children play on swings and enjoy fresh green grass in the evening?
options: 🛝 Neighbourhood park or playground
🚗 Busy traffic junction
✈️ Airport runway
problems.why: Parks have trees, flowers, and swings where children can play safely away from traffic!

problems.q: How can we make our neighbourhood a happy and beautiful place?
options: 🌱 Plant trees, use dustbins, and be polite to everyone
🗑️ Throw wrappers on the street and make loud noises daily
💥 Break garden benches and streetlights everywhere
problems.a: 🌱 Plant trees, use dustbins, and be polite to everyone
problems.why: A clean, green, and friendly neighbourhood makes life peaceful and joyful for all families!

intro: Many wonderful people work hard every day to make our lives comfortable.
Doctors, teachers, police officers, farmers, and cobblers are our community helpers.
We must respect every helper and appreciate their hard work!
concept.tip: Always say 'Thank You' to the helpers who make our day easier!

problems.q: Who grows food grains, fruits, and vegetables in the green fields for us to eat?
options: 👨‍🌾 Farmer
🧑‍✈️ Pilot
👨‍🎤 Singer
problems.why: Farmers work hard in the fields under sun and rain to grow the food we eat every day!

problems.q: Who treats us with medicines and injections when we fall sick?
options: 👨‍⚕️ Doctor
👨‍🚒 Firefighter
🧑‍🔧 Mechanic
problems.why: Doctors check our health and give proper treatment so we recover quickly!

problems.q: Who brings letters, parcels, and postcards to our home?
options: 📮 Postman
👨‍🍳 Chef
🧑‍🚀 Astronaut
problems.why: The postman collects mail from the post office and delivers letters to our doorstep!

problems.q: Who stitches and repairs our clothes so they fit us perfectly?
options: 🧵 Tailor
🔨 Carpenter
👨‍🌾 Farmer
problems.why: A tailor uses a sewing machine, thread, and needle to stitch beautiful shirts and dresses!

problems.q: Who mends our broken shoes and sandals?
options: 🥿 Cobbler
👩‍🏫 Teacher
👮 Police officer
problems.why: A cobbler repairs shoes, boots, and sandals so we can walk comfortably!

problems.q: Who rushes with a water hose to put out dangerous fires?
options: 👨‍🚒 Firefighter
🍞 Baker
📮 Postman
problems.why: Brave firefighters drive red fire engines and use big water hoses to put out fires and save lives!

problems.q: What should you say when you make a mistake or hurt someone by accident?
options: 🙏 Say the magic word 'SORRY' and try not to repeat it
🏃 Run away quickly and laugh out loud
😡 Blame someone else for your own mistake
problems.a: 🙏 Say the magic word 'SORRY' and try not to repeat it
problems.why: Saying sorry shows good manners and helps us learn from our mistakes with kindness!

intro: Our beloved country is Bharat (India). It is a land of rich cultures and celebrations!
We have colorful festivals, majestic mountains, rivers, and diverse traditions.
We all love our country and stand proud of our National Symbols!
concept.tip: Always stand up straight and quiet when our National Anthem is playing!

problems.q: What is the name of our wonderful country?
options: 🇮🇳 Bharat (India)
🌏 Sri Lanka, our neighbor island country in the Indian Ocean
🏔️ Nepal, the mountainous country to our north
problems.why: Bharat (India) is our great motherland, famous for unity in diversity!

problems.q: What is the name of our beautiful National Bird, known for its colorful feathers?
options: 🦚 Peacock
🦜 Parrot
🐦 Pigeon
problems.why: The peacock is our National Bird! When it rains, it dances proudly with its vibrant blue and green feathers.

problems.q: Which majestic royal animal is our National Animal?
options: 🐅 Royal Bengal Tiger
🐘 Elephant
🐕 Dog
problems.why: The Royal Bengal Tiger represents strength, grace, and bravery as our National Animal!

problems.q: Which pink or white water flower is the National Flower of Bharat?
options: 🪷 Lotus
🌹 Rose
🌻 Sunflower
problems.why: The lotus grows peacefully in water and symbolizes purity and beauty as our National Flower!

problems.q: How many colors are there in our National Flag, the Tiranga?
options: 🇮🇳 Three colors: Saffron, White, and Green with a blue Chakra
☝️ Only one single blue color all over the flag
⚫ Black and yellow diagonal stripes everywhere
problems.a: 🇮🇳 Three colors: Saffron, White, and Green with a blue Chakra
problems.why: Our Tiranga has Saffron for courage, White for peace, and Green for prosperity, with the Ashoka Chakra in the center!

problems.q: What is the National Anthem of Bharat that we sing with pride in school?
options: 🎶 Jana Gana Mana
🎶 Vande Mataram, our beautiful National Song
🎶 Sare Jahan Se Achha, our famous patriotic song
problems.why: 'Jana Gana Mana' is our National Anthem written by Rabindranath Tagore. We stand at attention when we sing it!

problems.q: What makes Bharat special among all countries?
options: 🎉 People of diverse cultures and festivals live in harmony
🏔️ It is covered only in ice and snow all year round
🚫 Nobody celebrates any traditional festivals here
problems.a: 🎉 People of diverse cultures and festivals live in harmony
problems.why: In Bharat, we celebrate Diwali, Eid, Christmas, and Holi together as one big loving family!

intro: Beyond our country, there is a huge world full of many different countries!
People around the world may speak different languages or wear different clothes.
Yet, everywhere on Earth, children love to play, laugh, and learn just like us!
concept.tip: We are all citizens of one beautiful Earth, so we must be kind to everyone!

problems.q: What do we call the big round planet where all people, animals, and trees live?
options: 🌍 Earth
☀️ The Sun
🌙 The Moon
problems.why: Planet Earth is our wonderful shared home in the universe, covered with land and blue oceans!

problems.q: Are there many other countries and lands on Earth besides Bharat?
options: ✔️ Yes, there are nearly 200 countries around the world!
❌ No, Bharat is the only country on planet Earth
🌌 No, all other countries are on planet Jupiter
problems.a: ✔️ Yes, there are nearly 200 countries around the world!
problems.why: The world is huge and has many countries like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, and Australia!

problems.q: Even though children around the world speak different languages, what common things do all children enjoy?
options: ⚽ Playing games, laughing, and celebrating with family
📚 Reading only school text books without playing games
🛌 Sleeping all day inside bedrooms without meeting friends
problems.a: ⚽ Playing games, laughing, and celebrating with family
problems.why: No matter where we live, smiles, friendship, and play are a universal language for all children!

problems.q: What covers most of our planet Earth, making it look blue from outer space?
options: 🌊 Vast blue oceans and seas of water
🏜️ Dry yellow desert sands and rocky mountain ranges
🌳 Dense green grass and forest trees everywhere
problems.a: 🌊 Vast blue oceans and seas of water
problems.why: More than half of our Earth is covered with water in oceans and seas, which is why it is called the Blue Planet!

problems.q: How do people travel across wide oceans to visit friends in far away countries around the world?
options: ✈️ By airplanes and big ships
🚆 By riding express railway trains across the ocean surface
🚗 By driving motor cars and school buses over ocean waves
problems.why: Airplanes zoom through the sky and ships sail across oceans to connect people all over the world!

problems.q: What is a globe?
options: 🌐 A small round model of our planet Earth
🗺️ A flat paper map showing city roads and streets
🔭 A powerful telescope used to look at distant stars
problems.a: 🌐 A small round model of our planet Earth
problems.why: A globe shows us a miniature round model of how countries and oceans look on Earth!

problems.q: Why is it important to learn about different cultures and countries?
options: 🤝 It helps us make new friends and respect global traditions
😤 So we can argue about which country flag is best
🙈 Because we should never travel outside our home
problems.a: 🤝 It helps us make new friends and respect global traditions
problems.why: Learning about the world opens our hearts to new ideas, delicious foods, and global friendship!

intro: When we look up at the sky, we see the amazing universe!
In the daytime, the bright golden Sun shines and gives us heat and light.
At night, the cool Moon and twinkling stars light up the dark sky!
concept.tip: Never look directly at the bright Sun with your bare eyes!

problems.q: What shines brightly in the sky during the daytime and gives us heat and light?
options: ☀️ The Sun
🌙 The Moon
⭐ A tiny star
problems.why: The Sun is a huge ball of hot fire that warms our Earth and gives us daylight to see!

problems.q: What do we see twinkling beautifully in the night sky?
options: ⭐ Thousands of twinkling stars and the Moon
🌈 Bright colorful rainbow arches after rain
🦅 Flying mountain eagles and forest birds
problems.a: ⭐ Thousands of twinkling stars and the Moon
problems.why: When the sun sets, the sky turns dark and we can see the Moon and distant glowing stars!

problems.q: Why do the stars look so tiny in the night sky?
options: 🔭 Because they are very, very far away from our Earth
🌙 Because they are smaller than rain clouds in the sky
☀️ Because they only shine with weak reflected sunlight
problems.a: 🔭 Because they are very, very far away from our Earth
problems.why: Stars are actually giant glowing suns, but they look like tiny dots because they are millions of miles away!

problems.q: Does the shape of the Moon look the same every night?
options: 🌓 No, the Moon changes shape from crescent to a circle!
🌕 Yes, the Moon is always a full round circle every night
🌑 Yes, the Moon never changes its shape or brightness
problems.a: 🌓 No, the Moon changes shape from crescent to a circle!
problems.why: As the Moon travels around Earth, we see different bright parts of it, making its shape seem to change!

problems.q: What are soft, white, puffy clouds in the sky made of?
options: ☁️ Tiny water drops floating in the air
💨 Thick gray smoke rising from kitchen fires and chimneys
❄️ Heavy solid blocks of ice floating in the atmosphere
problems.a: ☁️ Tiny water drops floating in the air
problems.why: Clouds are made of billions of tiny floating drops of water that gather together in the sky!

problems.q: When dark gray clouds gather in the sky, what weather is usually coming?
options: 🌧️ Cool rain and showers
🏜️ Hot desert sandstorms and dry winds coming
❄️ Freezing winter snowstorms in summer heat
problems.why: Heavy dark clouds are full of water droplets ready to fall down as refreshing rain!

problems.q: What colorful arch of seven colors appears in the sky when sunshine hits falling raindrops?
options: 🌈 Rainbow
⚡ Bright lightning bolts flashing during heavy storms
☁️ White puffy rain clouds floating across the sky
problems.why: A magical rainbow with seven beautiful colors shines when sunlight bends through raindrops!
